price: Schauen sie denn nicht zu den Kamelen, wie sie erschaffen worden sind,
arabic: أَفَلَا يَنظُرُونَ إِلَى ٱلۡإِبِلِ كَيۡفَ خُلِقَتۡ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: afalā yanẓurūna ilā al-ibili kayfa khuliqat
